name: Tier 2 Materials
pages: This page shows all available tier 2 materials.

pages.text: $(item)Frost Metal$() is a hard and cold metal.
Use time warp with 1 $(item)Titanium Ingot$(), 1 $(item)Silver Ingot$() and 1 $(item)Iron Ingot$() to craft it.
Use time warp with $(item)Royal Steel Upgrade Smithing Template$() to craft this. Can be used to upgrade $(thing)Royal Steel tools$() to $(thing)Frost Metal tools$().
Use $(item)Frost Metal Ingot$() to upgrade your tools. They will include $(l:advanced_tool_properties#merciless)Merciless$(/l) property.
Use $(item)Frost Metal Ingot$() to upgrade your tools. They will include $(l:advanced_tool_properties#merciless)Merciless$(/l) property.
Use $(item)Frost Metal Ingot$() to upgrade your tools. They will include $(l:advanced_tool_properties#merciless)Merciless$(/l) property.
$(item)Ember Metal$() is a very hot metal. $(br)Use time warp with any $(thing)heated Netherite Blocks$() to craft this. You can add 1-3 $(item)Earth Core Shard$() to increase result.
You can find this template in the Village's Weaponsmith. Trade with $(l:smithing_jewelcrafting_table)Jeweler$(/l) villager can also get this template.
This smithing table is used to smith recipes more complex. With this, you will be able to go further on Smithing.
This anvil is similar to $(item)Royal Steel Anvil$(), but it can make you combine some conflict enchantments to items forcefully.

On $(item)Ember Grindstone$(), you can cost XP to extract enchantments from enchanted items. Only need to put the item and regular books in, select an enchantment, and you will be able to cost displayed XP to extract the selected enchantment. It will be no "Too Expensive!", but will still add repair cost to the item has been extracted.
Use $(item)Ember Metal Ingot$() to upgrade your tools. They will include $(l:advanced_tool_properties#reforging)Fire Reforging$(/l) property.
Use $(item)Ember Metal Ingot$() to upgrade your tools. They will include $(l:advanced_tool_properties#reforging)Fire Reforging$(/l) property.
Use $(item)Ember Metal Ingot$() to upgrade your tools. They will include $(l:advanced_tool_properties#reforging)Fire Reforging$(/l) property.
（此处为对撞配方，等待对撞适配）在对撞装置尾部放上$(l:smithing_tier_2_materials#frost_metal_block_and_nugget)一块浮霜金属块$(/l)，并成功执行一次对撞获得。

pages.title: 多合一锻造模板
pages.text: 将多个互不相同的锻造模板进行物品冲压加工获得，由模板数量决定获得的是几合一锻造模板。
使用多相物质升级你的工具，它们将自带$(l:advanced_tool_properties#reforging)重铸$(/l)和$(l:advanced_tool_properties#multiphase)多相$(/l)属性。
